title: Dashboard save fix & /config help
changes: Fixed dashboard save — settings save in-place without page reload or black screen
Fixed discard — correctly restores all field types (inputs, selects, toggles) to original server values
Fixed discard on dispatch/moveme pages — fully restores channel tag state with a clean re-render
Fixed save race condition — pendingChanges is snapshotted before the API call to prevent mid-flight corruption
Fixed dispatch state after save — alias keys (currentPatrolChannels etc.) kept in sync so subsequent edits work correctly
Enabling a feature from the Features page now auto-navigates to its Configure page
Added /config help — quick-reference list of all config subcommands in Discord
